mapper.sql: id, name, provider_id, model_id, create_time, update_time, delete_time
mapper.insert: insert into t_knowledge (id, name, provider_id, model_id, create_time, update_time, delete_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{providerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deleteTime,jdbcType=BIGINT})

insert into t_knowledge
id,
name,
provider_id,
model_id,
create_time,
update_time,
delete_time,
#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{providerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{modelId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{deleteTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
mapper.update:
update t_knowledge
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
provider_id = #{providerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_id = #{modelId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
delete_time = #{deleteTime,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update t_knowledge set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, provider_id = #{providerId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_id = #{modelId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, delete_time = #{deleteTime,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
